ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* Size in UK standard */,
  "usa_size" TEXT /* Size in USA standard */,
  "fr_size" TEXT /* Size in France standard */,
  "de_size" TEXT /* Size in Germany standard */,
  "aus_size" TEXT /* Size in Australia standard */,
  "it_size" TEXT /* Size in Italy standard */,
  "eur_size" TEXT /* Size in European Union standard */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the size conversion is for */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category the size conversion is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., clothing, shoes, accessories) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Availability status (true for available, false for out of stock) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the inventory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product information was last updated */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size conversion */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in this size */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the size is for */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, inventory clerk, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being logged */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., add, remove) */,
  "quantity_change" INTEGER /* Quantity change (positive for addition, negative for removal) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size sold */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user recording the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Three-letter currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Currency symbol (e.g., $, €) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Primary language code used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
